name: oh-finance
description: SaaS متعدد المحلات لإدارة الزبائن والطلبات الآجلة والدفعات والديون

scripts.build:api: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @oh/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build:packages && tsc -b tsconfig.web.json && npm run build -w @oh/web
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -n api,web -c green,blue "npm run dev -w @oh/api" "npm run dev -w @oh/web"
scripts.test:unit: vitest run --project money --project contracts --project config --project ui --project web
scripts.db:migrate: node tooling/check-db-env.mjs migrate && prisma migrate deploy --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:dev: node tooling/check-db-env.mjs migrate && prisma migrate dev --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:seed: node tooling/check-db-env.mjs seed && npm run seed -w @oh/api
scripts.db:studio: node tooling/check-db-env.mjs studio && prisma studio --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
